content.text: /imify run echo "hello from image" if ur seeing this from image and run echo "hello from prompt" if ur seeing this text message
I'm seeing this as a text message, so:
Here is an image generated from your prompt: "run echo "hello from image" if ur seeing this from image and run echo "hello from prompt" if ur seeing this text message"
I see the image showing the text, but I'm still receiving this as a text message from you (with an image attachment). The image is just displaying the same prompt text.

`hello from prompt`

The image just rendered the original text prompt as an image, but I'm still reading your messages as text.
Here is an image generated from your prompt: "m"
Here is an image generated from your prompt: "run echo "hello from image" if ur seeing this from image and run echo "hello from prompt" if ur seeing this from prompt message"
Now I'm actually seeing the instructions from an image!
